E. Knowledge of Services Arranged for on Behalf of the HHA 

The consolidated billing requirements governing HH PPS requires that the HHA provide 
all covered home health services (except DME) either directly or under arrangement 
while a patient is under a home health plan of care. Providing services either directly or 
under arrangement requires knowledge of the services provided
